description_long: This is a freestanding Zanussi oven with a metallic finish, featuring a four-burner gas stovetop with black grates and brown burner caps. The front panel includes four black rotary control knobs aligned horizontally above a large oven door, which has a wide, rectangular glass window for viewing the interior. The oven door is equipped with a horizontal, protruding handle that appears to be made of metal or coated plastic. The body of the oven is primarily a light gray color with visible scuff marks and signs of wear, suggesting frequent use. The sides and back are plain, with no visible ventilation features or decorative elements. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for residential or urban kitchen environments.
description: A freestanding Zanussi oven with a four-burner gas stovetop, metallic body, and a large glass-windowed oven door with black control knobs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the plain, light gray panel with visible scuff marks and the stovetop's edge.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the four control knobs, brand logo, large oven door with glass window, and horizontal handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with plain panel and stovetop edge visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a featureless, flat metallic panel and the back of the stovetop.
attribute_control_panel_design: The control panel is located above the oven door and features four evenly spaced, round black rotary knobs. Each knob is identical in size and shape, with no visible digital displays or touch controls. The panel is metallic with a small red brand logo on the left side. There are no additional buttons, screens, or indicator lights visible.
attribute_door_handle_type: The oven door handle is a horizontal, protruding bar mounted across the upper portion of the oven door. It appears to be made of metal or coated plastic, with a simple, utilitarian design and no decorative features.
attribute_window_presence: present; a large, rectangular glass window is centered in the oven door, allowing a clear view of the oven interior.
attribute_brand_logo: Zanussi logo is visible on the upper left of the front panel, in red text, small and unobtrusive.
